steps.observed: Agent creation form displayed with Basic Information and Adapter Type cards

steps.expected: Dropdown opens showing all adapter types
steps.observed: Dropdown opened showing 10 adapter type options

steps.expected: claude_local, codex_local, cursor, gemini_local, opencode_local, pi_local, openclaw_gateway, process, http, hermes
steps.observed: All 10 types present: Claude Code (local), Codex (local), Gemini CLI (local), OpenCode (local), Pi (local), Cursor CLI (local), OpenClaw Gateway, Shell Process, HTTP Webhook, Hermes Agent

steps.action: Select Hermes Agent from adapter type dropdown
steps.observed: Hermes Agent Configuration panel rendered with all expected fields

steps.expected: Model dropdown present with model options
steps.observed: Model combobox present, defaulting to 'Claude Opus 4.6 (Anthropic)'

steps.expected: Toolsets checkboxes for each toolset category
steps.observed: 7 toolset checkboxes rendered in grid: Web Search & Browse, Terminal / Shell, File System, Browser Automation, Research & Analysis, Code Generation, Delegation / Sub-agents. Default checked: web, terminal, file, code
Memory Mode combobox present, defaulting to 'Local (file-based)'

steps.expected: MCP servers section with Add Server button
steps.observed: MCP Servers section with '+ Add Server' button and placeholder text about configuring external tool servers

assertions.title: Hermes adapter config produces valid JSON

steps.action: Dynamic import of buildHermesConfig via browser console with default values
steps.expected: JSON object with fields: hermes_home, model, provider, enabled_toolsets, memory_mode, mcp_servers
steps.observed: Returned: {hermes_home: '~/.hermes', model: 'anthropic/claude-opus-4.6', provider: 'auto', enabled_toolsets: ['web','terminal','file','code'], memory_mode: 'local', mcp_servers: [], max_turns: 25}

steps.action: Dynamic import of buildHermesConfig via browser console with custom extras
steps.expected: JSON object reflects custom values for all fields
steps.observed: Returned: {hermes_home: '~/.hermes', model: 'openai/gpt-4o', provider: 'openrouter', enabled_toolsets: ['web','browser','research'], memory_mode: 'honcho', mcp_servers: [{name:'test-server',url:'https://mcp.example.com'}], max_turns: 50}

steps.expected: Function produces object with required fields
steps.observed: src/adapters/hermes/build-config.ts exports buildHermesConfig() that constructs object with hermes_home, model, provider, enabled_toolsets, memory_mode, mcp_servers, max_turns

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. All 10 adapter types are registered in the dropdown (VAL-AGENT-004). Hermes adapter config fields render correctly with model selector, provider dropdown, toolsets multi-select checkboxes, memory mode dropdown, and MCP server configuration (VAL-AGENT-005). buildHermesConfig() produces valid JSON with all required fields: hermes_home, model, provider, enabled_toolsets, memory_mode, mcp_servers (VAL-AGENT-006).
